title: callista wardiana
intro: Callista wardiana, also known as the "Moon Orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Callista wardiana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
